title: arenaria suffruticosa
intro: Arenaria suffruticosa, also known as Sandwort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the pink family (Caryophyllaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Arenaria suffruticosa include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and it can also be used to make tinctures and ointments for topical application.
